siri_text: Friday's workout. Strength: Front Squat, 2 by 10 at 60 percent. Strength: Hack Squat, 3 by 10. Strength: Hamstring Curl, 3 by 10. Strength: Overhead Walking Lunge, 3 by 10. Metcon: Crossfit Games Open 21.2 RX (Ages 16-54). For Time, 20 min cap: 10 dumbbell snatches, 15 burpee box jump-overs, 20 dumbbell snatches, 15 burpee box jump-overs, 30 dumbbell snatches. For hypertrophy, focus on back, chest, shoulders.
